flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Bay de Noc Community College fell 21% between 2006 and 2009 (26.9% → 21.4%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Bay de Noc Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Bay de Noc Community College rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 (48.6% → 59.4%).
